## [06:03 - 07:12]

I got people already talking about me and Product Launch Formula 3.0, my upcoming launch. A couple of other things I did was I was interviewed a couple of times like for popular membership sites in that month before my launch. All of a sudden I made myself more accessible to be interviewed. And I went out and I spoke at a big event with four or 500 attendees. Normally I don't take too many speaking gigs, but this one, it put me in front of a good audience just about a week and a half before pre-launch. And the thing is, is when you're at events, those people are often persons of influence. People that travel to events are often connectors and persons of influence. So by putting myself, you know, at an event with four or 500 attendees, many of them persons of influence, by doing a couple of interviews, and by getting my JV partners going, and by getting my list going with that shout across the bow, all of a sudden, even weeks before pre-launch, I had people anticipating what was coming.
